title: Create Kart
description: Add-on for Create mod that adds a 3D modeled kart as a functional vehicle in the game.
body:
Create Kart - A Unique Create Expansion!

This addon introduces an all-new vehicle: a fully functional kart, whose design is entirely automatable using the advanced mechanisms of the Create mod. Build your kart using the complex tools and processes offered by the mod, and enjoy a unique style inspired by the various textures of Create's blocks.

Race with your friends, explore vast worlds on wheels, or simply move around in style with this whimsical new vehicle!

The mod was tested with create 6.0 and it work :)
